categories.name: Specialty Benchmark (Medicare Provider Utilization)
categories.latest_available: 2024 (RY24 released ~May 2025 per CMS methodology doc dated 2024-05-30)
categories.notes: 2024 data should be available on data.cms.gov. Need to download and filter for tracked specialties. This would extend trends from 2013-2023 to 2013-2024.

categories.name: Payer Rates (Transparency in Coverage)
categories.notes: Payer MRFs are updated monthly per No Surprises Act. However, downloading and parsing multi-GB MRF files requires specialized tooling. Consider using Turquoise Health or Dolthub aggregations instead.

categories.name: Medicare Fee Schedule
categories.notes: CY2026 PFS final rule issued Oct 31 2025. Key changes: +3.26% non-QP conversion factor, +3.77% QP conversion factor, -2.5% efficiency adjustment on non-time-based work RVUs, updated PE methodology for office vs facility settings. New rates in effect since Jan 1 2026.

categories.name: GLP-1 Trends (Part D Spending)
categories.notes: Data vintage is current. MAJOR POLICY UPDATE: CMS BALANCE model announced - GLP-1 coverage expanding to weight management in Medicaid (May 2026) and Part D (Jan 2027). Medicare GLP-1 payment demonstration launching July 2026 with $50/month beneficiary cost. This will dramatically change GLP-1 spending data in future updates.

categories.name: ED Trends
categories.notes: Tied to same CMS Provider Utilization release as specialty benchmark. 2024 data would add another year to the 2018-2023 trend.

categories.name: Provider Density
categories.notes: Same source as specialty benchmark. Update with 2024 data when available.

categories.name: HPSA Shortage Areas
categories.notes: HRSA HPSA data is refreshed daily. Latest data as of March 10, 2026. Can be downloaded from data.hrsa.gov in bulk. 20% of US population lives in primary care HPSAs.

emerging_topics.recommendation: HIGH PRIORITY - Add a section tracking BALANCE model implementation timeline and projected spending impact. This will be the biggest driver of GLP-1 data changes starting mid-2026.

emerging_topics.source: CMS PFS 2026 final rule includes permanent telehealth flexibilities. CMS telehealth utilization data available.
emerging_topics.recommendation: Add telehealth utilization page. 2026 PFS permanently allows virtual supervision and teaching physician virtual presence.

emerging_topics.source: No CMS claims data yet for AI-specific services. Epic reports 85% customer AI adoption.
emerging_topics.recommendation: Track but don't add to dashboard yet. Watch for CPT code introductions for AI-assisted services.
Add MA enrollment trends. MA now >50% of Medicare enrollment. Rate dynamics differ significantly from FFS data in current dashboard.

immediate_actions: UPDATE: Medicare Fee Schedule data to 2026 rates (3.26% conversion factor increase)
UPDATE: HPSA shortage data from HRSA (daily refresh available)
INVESTIGATE: CMS Provider Utilization 2024 data availability on data.cms.gov
ADD CONTEXT: GLP-1 page should note upcoming BALANCE model and $50/month demonstration
FUTURE: Add telehealth and MA enrollment pages when data pipeline is established
